completed_work: Recorded completion of the diagnostic-only advisor evaluation module and CLI.
Prepared SELF_MODEL and self-model tests for completed plans = 6 and supported warrants = 12.
key_decisions: PLAN-20260707-0001 is completed and has no remaining implementation work.
The evaluation harness reads saved manifests and stays diagnostic-only.
Automatic L0 inclusion remains out of scope and requires a separate PLAN/WARRANT.
next_actions: Use the evaluation CLI on representative saved manifests to gather evidence before considering any automatic L0 inclusion proposal.
open_questions: Which saved manifest corpus should be used for the first substantive advisor quality evaluation?
What acceptance thresholds should justify a later automatic inclusion proposal?
risks: Evaluation evidence may still be misread as automatic selection approval unless future work preserves the diagnostic-only boundary.
summary_text: PLAN-20260707-0001 is completed against implementation commit 58fea51. The completed slice added a diagnostic-only evaluator module and CLI for saved context-pack manifest JSON files containing manifest.diagnostics.l0_discovery_advisor. The evaluator records manifest-level and aggregate suggestion evidence, including missing/invalid advisor diagnostics, total and unique suggestions, duplicates, already-selected suggestions, and guardrails. It remains observational only: no automatic include_l0 behavior, no ContextPackManifest.items mutation, no provider prompt or latest-context prompt changes, no live retrieval, no external embedding API calls, no production embedding creation, no index or memory-store mutation, no token-budget telemetry/enforcement, no non-none reranking, and no adapter behavior.
